notes: CDP on chat.qwen.ai. Composer textarea.message-input-textarea accepted the full PII text (verified via Input.insertText AND genuine Ctrl+V clipboard paste). However the send control div.message-input-right-button-send (.omni-button-content-btn) stayed permanently disabled: style='opacity:0.4;cursor:not-allowed' regardless of input method. Tried: CDP insertText, JS native value-setter + input/change events, real CDP Input.dispatchMouseEvent at button (890,294), Enter keyDown/keyUp, synthetic JS KeyboardEvents, and forced JS .click() on both wrapper and inner btn. None enabled or fired submission; no navigation, no login modal. Anonymous Qwen Studio landing requires login to start a chat on this build, so the prompt never reached the engine. Login wall blocked submission. (Note: prior 1393 W7 passed anonymously - service appears to have tightened anon access.)
